name: agentic_web_crawl
description: Fetch any URL and extract page content and SEO signals: title, meta description, Open Graph tags, canonical URL, robots directives, heading structure, word count, and link breakdown.

url.description: The URL to analyse. Must use http or https. Example: 'https://example.com/article'

extract.description: Comma-separated list of what to extract: text, links, images, metadata. Default: 'all'. For SEO audits use 'metadata' or 'metadata,links'.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. Min 1, max 60. Default: 15

max_links.description: Maximum number of links to return. Default: 50

max_images.description: Maximum number of images to return. Default: 20
